When a deal's stage changes to Closed Wo: "When a deal's stage changes to Closed Won, create a task assigned to the deal owner, due 7 days after the close date, with title "Post-sale check-in" and the company name in the description.
When a new lead is created with source \: "When a new lead is created with source "Website", assign it to the sales rep whose territory (by region/country) matches the lead's address; if no match, assign to the team lead.
When any deal with amount over $100,000: "When any deal with amount over $100,000 has its stage or amount updated, send a notification to the sales channel with the deal name, company, new stage, amount and owner.
